categories.label: Motion detected (legacy)
categories.note: Legacy single-stream category, kept for backwards compatibility. Prefer the three Notice / Alert / Critical tiers below.

categories.label: Surveillance — Notice
categories.note: Routine motion or passing-by. Off by default — turn on if you want a record of every event.

categories.label: Surveillance — Alert
categories.note: Person near the vehicle, vehicle approaching, or close-range activity.

categories.label: Surveillance — Critical
categories.note: Person at very close range or sustained dwell at the vehicle. Drop-everything alert.

categories.label: Proximity alert
categories.note: Range and trigger depend on Recording settings

categories.label: Tyre pressure alarm
categories.note: Underpressure or overpressure detected by TPMS

categories.label: Tyre leak detected
categories.note: Slow or fast leak detected by TPMS sensor

categories.label: Door opened
categories.note: Fires when any door, hood, or trunk is opened while parked (ACC OFF)

categories.label: Door closed
categories.note: Fires when any door, hood, or trunk is closed while parked (ACC OFF)

categories.label: Charging started
categories.note: Fires when the BMS reports a charging session has begun

categories.label: Charging stopped
categories.note: Debounced 10s to ride out brief gaps during plug-in or DC charger handshakes

categories.label: Charging complete
categories.note: Fires once per session when the pack reaches near-full or the BMS marks the session FINISHED. Suppressed if you plug in an already-full car. Bypasses quiet hours so you wake up to an unplug reminder.

categories.label: Charging fault
categories.note: AC, DC charger, charging gun, or C10 breakdown reported by BMS

categories.label: Battery capacity mismatch
categories.note: Fires once per anchor lifetime when the BMS's full-charge kWh disagrees with the user-set pack capacity by >15% — usually a nameplate-vs-usable mix-up on PHEV (e.g. Tang DM-i 21.5 nominal vs ~13 usable). The Battery Health dialog has a one-tap fix.

categories.label: Automation fired
categories.note: Can be sent by creating an automation action to send a notification.
